heading: Step 1: Deploy an  or higher cluster.
body:
You must deploy an `M10` cluster with the same MongoDB
[version](supported-mdb-versions) as the paused Free cluster.
To learn more about deploying an `M10` or higher
cluster with a specific MongoDB version, see
[Create a Cluster](create-new-cluster). If you use the Atlas UI to create
the cluster, click **Advanced Settings** to
[Select the MongoDB Version of the Cluster](create-cluster-version). If your paused Free cluster
was running a MongoDB version that has since reached EOL
(End of Life), you won't be able to deploy an `M10` cluster
with the same version as the Free cluster.

Wait until your cluster is deployed before proceeding to the
next step.

> **Important:** You must delete the `M10` cluster at the end of this
> procedure to avoid charges.
